title: selenicereus inermis subsp. tricae
intro: Selenicereus inermis subsp. tricae, also known as the 'Tricae Prickly Pear Cactus', is a rare, flowering species of cactus belonging to the Selenicereus genus. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and wounds, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Selenicereus inermis subsp. tricae include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's stems and flowers are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
